历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8664 → 9995 → 11415 → 12988 → 13078, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4414 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 13078, only 90 places behind 2024, indicating a significant slowdown in the backward shift; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 25, 27, 23, 25, and 25 respectively, with the 2026 plan at 25, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the competitive landscape is basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 58th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affairs during marriage, mistaken display of the Rising Sun Flag incident), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, with average reviews and medium short video exposure; no history of admission gaps; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, highly correlated with enrollment majors such as Geography Science and Chemistry (Teacher Training).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is socially recommended as hot, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended as hot, matching the enrollment majors in Physics Category such as Computer Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, which may increase the application popularity of related majors; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province for 2026 is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.2% from 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, belonging to cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province has been stable at around 25 in recent years, accounting for a small proportion, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward shift in historical rankings but stabilization from 2024 to 2025, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, about 6.2% increase in local Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, negative reputation possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm, and high popularity of Computer/Electronic Information majors attracting candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly intensifies) based on the 2025 ranking of 13078; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13048, with a range of 12548–13548.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 994 → 1014 → 1462 → 1561 → 1504. It continuously declined from 2021 to 2024, but in 2025 it moved up 57 places compared to 2024, showing a slight rebound. The baseline for 2025 is about 1504. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 7, 5, 9, 7, and 7 respectively. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 9, an increase of 2 (approximately 28.6% expansion) compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is approximately 58th, with a stable ranking in the 50–60 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is clearly negative, mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean was dismissed for extramarital affairs, and the mistaken display of the Rising Sun flag incident), which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 69th with average reviews, and short video exposure is moderate. There is no history of admission gaps. It has A-level disciplines in Education, A-level in Marxist Theory, A- in Chinese Language and Literature, and A- in Foreign Languages and Literatures. Its teacher-training disciplines are outstanding, highly relevant to the History Category majors such as Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training), Chinese International Education (Teacher Training), and Primary Education (Teacher Training).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors is divided and uncertain; Chinese Language/Literature majors are recommended; Law is divided and uncertain. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province is about 64,000, an increase of approximately 6.2% from 60,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and is a cross-province application. Its enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province increases to 9 in 2026, a very small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight rebound in 2025 rankings, the approximately 28.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the approximately 6.2% increase in local History Category examinees partially offsetting the expansion effect, the negative reputation possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the divided popularity of teacher-training majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly decline (easier to enter) from the 2025 ranking of 1504. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1742, with a range of 1428–2056.

- Law.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1428–2056, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<1428), you can focus on aiming for Chinese Language and Literature Category and Law. If your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (>2056), Primary Education should be the main choice.
